partial class M
{
    public static global::Dst Map(global::Src src)
    {
        global::System.ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(src);
        var __dst = new global::Dst(
            Quantity: int.Parse(src.Quantity, global::System.Globalization.CultureInfo.GetCultureInfo("nl-NL"))
        );
        return __dst;
    }
}
